tagline: We Don't Just Build Pools. We Build Memories.

hero.headline: 63 Years of Pools Built to Last
hero.subheadline: Three generations of Chester County families have trusted Gritz Pools to design, build, and maintain their backyard retreats. From custom pool construction to hot tubs and supplies, we handle everything so you just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs,<br class="hidden md:block"> All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From building your dream pool to keeping it crystal clear for decades, Gritz Pools & Spas is the only call you need to make.

cards.title: Inground Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed vinyl liner and fiberglass pools built to fit your backyard, your lifestyle, and your budget. From first sketch to first splash.

cards.title: Pool Service & Repair
cards.description: Seasonal openings, closings, equipment diagnostics, and repairs. We keep your pool running smoothly so every weekend is swim-ready.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Expert measurement, pattern selection, and flawless installation to refresh the look and extend the life of your existing inground pool.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Authorized Nordic and Aspen spa dealer. Visit our showroom to find the perfect hot tub with hands-on guidance from our team.

cards.title: Pool Supply Store
cards.description: Chemicals, accessories, covers, toys, floats, and outdoor furniture. Everything you need for pool and spa season, all in one place.

cards.title: Pool Water Delivery
cards.description: Convenient bulk water delivery to fill or top off your pool. Save time and start swimming faster with clean, quality water delivered to your door.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Pool

steps.title: Tell Us Your Vision
steps.description: Whether you want a new pool, a liner refresh, or a hot tub for the patio, give us a call or stop by the store. We'll listen, answer every question, and give you an honest, no-pressure estimate.

steps.title: We Bring It to Life
steps.description: Our experienced crew handles the entire project from permits to final inspection. The owner personally visits every job site to make sure everything meets the Gritz standard.

steps.title: Enjoy for Decades
steps.description: Your pool is built to last, and so is our relationship. We're here for openings, closings, repairs, and supplies for as long as you own your home. Many of our customers have been with us for 40+ years.

about.label: Why Chester County Trusts Us
about.headline: Three Generations. One Family. Your Pool Team.
about.description: Since 1963, Gritz Pools & Spas has been Chester County's go-to pool company. We started as a small family operation and grew into the region's number one pool builder, service provider, and retail store — all without losing the personal touch that built our name. The owner still visits every job site. Our staff still walks you through maintenance over the phone. And families who built their first pool with us in the 1970s are still our customers today.

features.title: Family-Owned Since 1963
features.description: Not a franchise, not a chain. A real local family business with deep roots in the Chester County community for over 60 years.

features.title: Full-Service, One Company
features.description: Construction, service, repair, retail, water delivery, and hot tubs. No need to juggle multiple contractors. We do it all.

features.title: Relationships That Last Decades
features.description: Many of our customers have trusted us for 30, 40, even 50 years. We earn that loyalty with honest work and genuine care.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets an upfront, honest estimate. No hidden fees, no change orders, no pressure. Just fair pricing from a family you can trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If something isn't right, we make it right. It's that simple. We stand behind every pool we build, every liner we install, and every repair we complete. Your satisfaction isn't a policy — it's a 63-year-old family promise.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new inground pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects take 4-8 weeks from groundbreaking to completion, depending on the design complexity and weather. We'll give you a clear timeline upfront and keep you updated at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool openings and closings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer full seasonal opening and closing services to protect your pool through Pennsylvania winters and get you swim-ready every spring. Book early — our spring schedule fills up fast.

faqs.question: What brands of hot tubs do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're an authorized dealer for Nordic Spas and Aspen Spas. Visit our showroom in Coatesville to see models in person and get expert guidance on which tub fits your space and budget.

faqs.question: Can you replace my vinyl pool liner?
faqs.answer: Yes, liner replacement is one of our specialties. We'll take precise measurements, help you pick from hundreds of patterns, and install it with a perfect fit. Most liner replacements are completed in just a few days.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Chester County, Berks County, West Chester, Oxford, Reading, Lancaster, Coatesville, and surrounding Pennsylvania communities. If you're not sure if we cover your area, just give us a call.

testimonials.name: Kristine D.
testimonials.text: Each time we worked with Mark, Robert, and the rest of the crew was a positive experience. They did a quality job each time and we got an excellent end product.

testimonials.name: Stephen M.
testimonials.text: As a contractor myself, I really appreciated their no-nonsense approach. They knew exactly what needed to be done and how long it would take, and did exactly what they said.

testimonials.name: Kay R.
testimonials.text: Our experience with Gritz has always been positive. We have been customers since our pool was installed in 1976. That's nearly 50 years of trust.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Backyard Paradise?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate from Chester County's most trusted pool company. Call us, stop by the store, or fill out the form — we'll get back to you fast.
